_source: IPCC 2006 Guidelines Vol.2 Ch.3 Table 3.2.1 + EPA GHG Emission Factors Hub 2023 + UK DEFRA Conversion Factors 2023

gasoline_kg_per_liter.source: IPCC 2006 Table 3.2.1 + EPA 2023 (2.31 kgCO2/L CO2 only; 2.348 includes CH4/N2O on 100yr GWP)
gasoline_kg_per_liter.note: Used as fallback when EPA co2TailpipeGpm field = 0 in vehicles.csv

diesel_kg_per_liter.source: IPCC 2006 Table 3.2.1 + UK DEFRA 2023 (2.68 kgCO2/L CO2 only; 2.69 with GWP100)

primary_data_source.note: For most vehicles, operational emissions use EPA co2TailpipeGpm directly from vehicles.csv — these fuel factors are fallback only
